scripts.check:all: cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --locked -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace --locked && cargo build --workspace --locked && bun run check && bun run fallow:ci && bun run docs:check && bun run wasm:reference:check && bun run vscode:check && bun run vscode:compile:check && bun run vscode:compile && bun run vscode:vsix:pack:check && bun run vscode:test:wasm
scripts.reference: bun run docs:reference && bun run wasm:reference
scripts.reference:check: bun run --cwd site check:reference && bun run wasm:reference:check
scripts.artifacts: bun run reference && bun run vscode:compile:all
scripts.artifacts:check: bun run reference:check && bun run vscode:check && bun run vscode:compile:check && bun run vscode:vsix:pack:check && bun run vscode:test:wasm
